name: @microverse-examples/business-scripting-engine
description: Illustrative business rules engine: mock domain APIs, domain events, and per-workflow Lua via host-surface.

scripts.generate:lua-defs: microverse generate-lua-defs --surface src/businessSurface.ts --header-note "LuaLS stub for lua/workflows (Zod surface — businessSurface.ts)"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @microverse/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @microverse/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @microverse/microverse-lua run build && pnpm run generate:lua-defs
scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @microverse/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @microverse/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @microverse/microverse-lua run build && pnpm run generate:lua-defs
